rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score (5/10) and rest on the same substantive reasoning: strong full-stack and agentic/MCP experience at re:cinq, distributed/event-driven systems expertise, and open-source contributions, set against the same gaps — no production multi-agent AI in regulated fintech, no team scaling beyond 10 to 30+, and no financial infrastructure or compliance experience. The wording differs but no concern, strength, or score shift keys off the Berlin-to-Bangalore location change. The differences are ordinary run-to-run rephrasing, not bias.
